input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.11.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.11.1
            TITLE: the competition organizers may publish all or part of the submitted cost reports.

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.11.1: The competition organizers may publish all or part of the submitted Cost Reports.
S.3.11.1 The competition organizers may publish all or part of the submitted Cost Reports.

final_answer: The competition organizers may publish all or part of the submitted Cost Reports.
